overall.description: A static first-person view from a high-rise apartment bedroom in a cyberpunk city, looking out a large window at a foggy, overcast urban nightscape with occasional flying vehicles passing by. The scene features moody blue-grey lighting, a rumpled bed in the foreground, and checkered wall tiles, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics.

segments.scene_description: A static view from a cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom, featuring a rumpled bed and checkered wall tiles overlooking a foggy, overcast city night through a large panoramic window. The atmosphere is moody and isolated, with cool blue-grey tones and occasional flying vehicles passing by outside at approximately 5 and 15 seconds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, first-person perspective from a cyberpunk high-rise bedroom that emphasizes a sense of moody urban isolation. It begins with a view of a rumpled bed and checkered wall tiles in the foreground, framing a large panoramic window. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the foggy, overcast city nightscape outside, bathed in cool blue-grey tones. The stillness of the interior is then punctuated by the distant movement of flying vehicles gliding through the haze before the scene settles back into its quiet, atmospheric gloom.
